content.en:
"Senior, I know the location of a treasure..."

The owner of Zi Lan Mountain wanted to exchange his life for the treasure, but Ye Tian didn't care at all.

Boom! ! ! !

Ye Tian killed again and again, and the Supreme Level Chonggong Secret Method Extreme Blood Blade slashed on the body of the owner of Zi Lan Mountain again and again.

Not long after, the body of the owner of Zi Lan Mountain was completely chopped into pieces and could never be restored.

After killing the owner of Zi Lan Mountain, Ye Tian immediately broke into the treasure house of Zi Lan Mountain and took away all the resources, treasures, and classics. The remaining Zi Lan guards didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian at all.

...

"Ancestor, did Master Ye kill the owner of Zi Lan Mountain?" Xiao Ya looked at the ancestor Xiao He and asked in shock.

Xiao He was also dumbfounded. What kind of existence is the master of Zi Lan Mountain? He is the overlord of Zi Lan Mountain for countless years. No one can threaten the status of the master of Zi Lan Mountain.

But now, the master of Zi Lan Mountain has been killed, and he has no chance to escape.

And Ye Tian, ​​who killed the master of Zi Lan Mountain, was recruited by their Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce to become a secret master. This is simply incredible.

"Xiao Ya, this secret master Ye should be a great 27 master who has taken over the body. He was previously in our Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce. He has just taken over the body and his cultivation has not yet recovered. Remember not to mention him in the future." Xiao He transmitted the voice.

"Yes, ancestor!"

Xiao Ya responded.

……

After obtaining countless classics from the master of Zi Lan Mountain, Ye Tian did not rush to leave. He spent some time in Zi Lan Mountain to comprehend. He mainly wanted to make himself more clearly understand the cultivation system of this time and space line, and to improve his Wan Fa Chong Gong again.

Even the three supreme Chong Gong secrets that he practiced were improved, and the power became more powerful.

In addition, he also began to refine the high-level Chong Gong Xuan Liquid - Purple Heart Xuan Liquid. The method of refining this Chong Gong Xuan Liquid was obtained from the treasure house of the master of Zi Lan Mountain, and there were a lot of materials, enough for him to refine.

Soon after, he successfully mastered the method of refining Purple Heart Xuan Liquid, and also refined a 100% pure Purple Heart Xuan Liquid.

Afterwards.

He used Purple Heart Xuan Liquid to improve his mana.

Ninth Heaven Seventh Level!

Ninth Heaven Eighth Level!

Ninth Heaven Ninth Level!

Ye Tian's cultivation level improved too fast. This was all due to the effect of the 100% pure purple heart liquid. In addition, he was practicing the supreme level Chonggong technique, so his cultivation speed was naturally not slow.

Soon, his cultivation level broke through to the tenth level.

If he fought with the master of Zi Lan Mountain with his current strength, he could kill the master of Zi Lan Mountain in one move. After all, the master of Zi Lan Mountain was just a useless thirteenth level strongman. Whether it was Chonggong technique or Chonggong secret technique, they were all very ordinary, and his combat effectiveness was naturally not good.

With enough resources, Ye Tian naturally continued to practice hard, and when his cultivation level was strong enough, he would go to other places.

Unconsciously, a long journey began.Long years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's cultivation has reached the realm of the twelfth heaven, and he can kill the master of Zi Lan Mountain in the thirteenth heaven in a snap of his fingers.

"We have to leave. There are not many resources here, and this is just a weak area of ​​this time and space line. The inheritance is limited, and we can't waste too much time here. The time and space line where my body is located is not too far away from the final catastrophe. If I waste too much time on this time and space line, it will cause me to be unable to break through or find hope to survive, then it will be too innocent!"

Ye Tian left quickly, silently, and no one knew he was gone.

...

The Tianxuan River.

This is a special river surrounding the Zi Lan Mountain area. It blocks the Zi Lan Mountain area, making it impossible for the practitioners in the Zi Lan Mountain area to leave. If you want to cross the Tianxuan River, you must have at least the strength of the tenth heaven, otherwise it will be very dangerous.

But even if you are a practitioner of the tenth heaven, you will fall if you are unlucky.

Ye Tian walked on the Tianxuan River, not in a hurry to cross the river, but waiting for danger to come.

Soon.

A terrifying monster came out of the river, and its aura reached the realm of the tenth heaven, but it did not walk the path of the heavy palace system, but the path of the physical system.

The monster attacked Ye Tian, ​​but was suppressed by Ye Tian with one hand and sealed in an instant.

"Let's study it later!"

Ye Tian said.

After that, he captured a lot of monsters in the Tianxuan River. These monsters are called blood beasts in this time and space line.

Among the blood beasts sealed by Ye Tian, ​​there are even blood beasts that rival the twelfth heaven, but they are still ants in his eyes.

Then, he left the Tianxuan River and went to other places.

From the information in the treasure house of the master of Zi Lan Mountain, he knew a lot about some nearby areas. There were many areas similar to Zi Lan Mountain. Somewhere far away from Zi Lan Mountain, there was an area called Wan Chong Mountain, where there were densely packed ancient giant cities and many strong people. The master of Zi Lan Mountain had been here before, but after being hit, he never dared to come again.

There were strong people above the twentieth level in this area of ​​Wan Chong Mountain.

But who was the strongest person here and what was his cultivation level? The master of Zi Lan Mountain was too weak to come into contact with such a strong person.

Ye Tian also knew that this area of ​​Wan Chong Mountain was definitely not the strongest place in this time and space line, but he definitely knew a lot of secrets. He would first come to this area to find out the situation.

After a period of time, Ye Tian kept shuttling back and forth, and finally arrived at this area of ​​Wan Chong Mountain on this day.

As soon as he arrived, he saw the endless and terrifying giant mountain. The breath of the giant mountain seemed to penetrate through layers of time and space, and countless strong men shuttled through it.

Soon.

He entered one of the ancient giant cities in Wanzhong Mountain - Baiyue Ancient City.

After he came here, the first thing he did was to understand the situation here and spend a little secret crystal to buy information.

Gradually, he got to know the situation in Wanchong Mountain, but still not much.

However, he knew that even in Wanchong Mountain, high-grade Chonggong Xuanye with a purity of more than 95% was very precious.

In addition, there was also top-grade Chonggong Xuanye.

High-grade Chonggong Xuanye was suitable for the ninth to twelfth heavens, and top-grade Chonggong Xuanye was suitable for the thirteenth to sixteenth heavens.

After that, it was necessary to refine Chonggong Jindan to greatly improve the mana.

Ye Tian currently did not have top-grade Chonggong Xuanye, and could not buy the method of refining top-grade Chonggong Xuanye. The best way was to infiltrate a force.

So, in the following days, he asked around a little and found a suitable target. .
